task_completion.description: Verify that a sell transaction for Xilinx (XLNX) was recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JStock transaction history or portfolio view, there is a 'Sell' entry for the stock ticker XLNX.

task_completion.description: Verify the details of the XLNX sell transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The XLNX Sell entry shows a date of Feb 14, 2022 (or 2022-02-14), a quantity/units of 100, and a price of 194.00.

task_completion.description: Verify that a buy transaction for AMD was recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JStock transaction history or portfolio view, there is a 'Buy' entry for the stock ticker AMD.

task_completion.description: Verify the details of the AMD buy transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AMD Buy entry shows a date of Feb 14, 2022 (or 2022-02-14), a quantity/units of 172.34, and a price of 112.57.

task_completion.description: Verify the comment on the AMD transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AMD Buy entry has a comment, note, or remark explicitly stating 'Merger acquisition'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the portfolio was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock interface does not show an 'unsaved changes' indicator (like an asterisk next to the portfolio name in the title bar or tab) or shows the user clicking the save button.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the JStock graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JStock application windows, dialogs, and menus being interacted with.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by editing files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open modifying the underlying .csv portfolio files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing Python scripts or shell commands being executed to modify the portfolio data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The merger date is Feb 14, 2022. The XLNX sell transaction must be for exactly 100 units at $194.00. The AMD buy transaction must be for exactly 172.34 units (100 original units * 1.7234 exchange ratio) at $112.57. The AMD transaction must include the exact comment 'Merger acquisition'.
